name: codex-kit
description: Codex Kit plugin with skills, hooks, and MCP helpers for Codex-ready repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold repos, use workflows, and set up Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-native setup flows for project scaffolding, local workflow routing inside scaffolded repositories, workspace plugin installation, local skill management, and shipped skill discovery.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Kit to set up this repository for Codex and install the workspace plugin.
Use Codex Kit to list, search, install, or sync the shipped Codex Kit skills.
If this repository already has Codex Kit workflows, follow the local workflow files in .agents/workflows before falling back to scaffold commands.
